overall.description: First-person perspective of a character walking along the shoulder of a coastal highway at night in a video game (GTA V). Vehicles with headlights pass by on the road as the character walks past guardrails and trees along the winding coastal route, eventually reaching a bridge section with concrete barriers.

events.description: large truck with bright headlights approaches and passes on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the highway, staying left of the traffic

notable_agents.action: semi-truck driving past on the highway with headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail running parallel to the road on the left side
multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings
unpaved dirt and gravel shoulder where the character is walking
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the shoulder of a coastal highway at night, with a metal guardrail on the left separating the path from the cliff edge. Vehicles including a large truck pass by on the right, their headlights cutting through the darkness. The terrain rises into hills on the right side while the left side drops off toward the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway with large roadside tree

events.description: large tree becomes visible on the left side near the guardrail as the road begins to curve
road curves noticeably to the left, requiring slight adjustment in walking direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as the highway curves leftward around a large tree

notable_agents.action: white sedan passing by on the highway

entered.detail: large leafy tree growing beside the guardrail on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The highway curves leftward around a prominent large tree standing beside the guardrail. The character continues walking on the dirt shoulder as vehicles pass by. The metal guardrail appears to recede slightly to the left-mid position as the path curves around the tree, with the hillside still rising on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway bridge with concrete barrier

events.description: metal guardrail transitions to concrete barrier as the road enters a bridge section
sharp right curve in the road requires significant direction change while walking

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp right curve on the bridge walkway, staying close to the concrete barrier

notable_agents.action: white sports car passing closely on the right side of the road

entered.detail: solid white concrete barrier replacing the metal guardrail along the bridge edge
elevated bridge roadway with concrete surface and drainage grooves

segments.scene_description: The path transitions onto an elevated bridge section where the metal guardrail is replaced by a solid concrete barrier. The road curves sharply to the right as vehicles including a white sports car pass by closely. The walking surface changes from dirt to concrete bridge decking, with the ocean visible beyond the barrier on the left and the hillside continuing on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark coastal highway as the camera navigates the narrow shoulder between rising hills and a steep cliffside. It begins with a steady walk beside a metal guardrail that separates the path from the ocean drop-off to the left. As the camera moves forward, the darkness is periodically pierced by the bright headlights of passing vehicles, including a large truck that surges past on the right. The scene then maintains this rhythmic progression, tracing the winding edge of the road where the terrain shifts between the looming hillside and the open void of the coast.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a winding coastal highway that transitions from a dirt shoulder into an elevated bridge. It begins as the camera curves leftward around a prominent large tree standing beside a metal guardrail, with vehicles passing by and a hillside rising to the right. As the path progresses, the metal railing gives way to a solid concrete barrier while the walking surface shifts from dirt to bridge decking. The scene then opens up to reveal the ocean beyond the barrier on the left as the road curves sharply to the right, passing closely by vehicles including a white sports car.
